title: helichrysum roseum var. patens
intro: Helichrysum roseum var. patens, also known as the Patented Everlasting, is a variant of the Helichrysum roseum plant, a flowering perennial native to South Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Helichrysum roseum var. patens include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and depression. This plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which are often used to support overall well-being and address specific health concerns.
